nodes.name: 南里奥格兰德州
nodes.summary: 南里奥格兰德州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联89种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-trained nightjar等89种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Star-throated antwren
nodes.summary: Star-throated antwren（Star-throated antwren，学名 Rhopias gularis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 常綠森林
nodes.summary: 常綠森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联442种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、角冠雉、Razor-billed curassow等442种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴伊亞州
nodes.summary: 巴伊亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联118种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Pygmy nightjar等118种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 巴拉那州
nodes.summary: 巴拉那州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联35种鸟类，包括孤䳍、黄腿穴䳍、Long-tailed potoo等35种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The star-throated antwren is found in coastal southeastern Brazil from southeastern Bahia south into northeastern Rio Grande do Sul and inland to western Paraná

links.evidence: The star-throated antwren is found in coastal southeastern Brazil from southeastern Bahia south into northeastern Rio Grande do Sul and inland to western Paraná

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The star-throated antwren is found in coastal southeastern Brazil from southeastern Bahia south into northeastern Rio Grande do Sul and inland to western Paraná

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It inhabits the understorey of evergreen forest

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It occurs in several nominally protected areas but "the deforestation, colonization, agricultural expansion and urbanization that inevitably follow an expanding human population in this already most densely populated region of Brazil will present continuing threats to the integrity of the reserves on which this and many other endemic species depend"
